world.title: More than 500 killed in Tanzania poll violence: govt
world.description: Tanzania's electoral violence last year left at least 518 dead, a government-appointed commission said Thursday, giving a figure far below opposition estimates and failing to say who was responsible.

world.title: DMW: 15 Pinoy seafarers onboard Iran-held ships safe

world.title: Taiwan condemns China for denying existence of ROC president
